commands.name: marketing.gtm-strategy
commands.description: Genera una estrategia Go-to-Market completa y detallada adaptada al estadio de la compañía. Incluye market analysis, positioning, pricing, channels, experiments, metrics, risks y timeline. Integra con CFO, Legal y Stage Adapter.

commands.name: marketing.positioning
commands.description: Define positioning y messaging para producto/feature

commands.name: marketing.growth-experiments
commands.description: Diseña y prioriza experiments de growth

commands.name: marketing.metrics-framework
commands.description: Crea framework de métricas (North Star + OKRs)
